channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Rappler Hosts Ask Me Anything Session with Kitchie Nadal on March 24 to Discuss New Single ‘Soundtrip’ and Her Music Career
item.description: Rappler is set to hold a live Ask Me Anything (AMA) session featuring Filipina rock icon Kitchie Nadal on Tuesday, March 24, 2026, at 1:00 pm. The event, hosted by multimedia reporter Juno Reyes, will...

item.title: The Risks of Using Inflation to Increase Tax Revenue Without Transparency
item.description: Australia is facing economic pressures reminiscent of the mid-1970s, including persistent inflation, public debt nearing $1 trillion, and increased defence spending needs due to Middle East tensions. ...

item.title: Air India to Operate Special Flight from Shannon to Delhi for Diverted Passengers
item.description: On 16th March 2026, Air India’s A350 aircraft operating from New York to Delhi experienced a technical problem mid-air and was subsequently diverted to Shannon, Ireland. The aircraft, which had been i...

item.title: Transgender Persons (Protection of Rights) Amendment Bill 2026 threatens self-identification and rights of non-binary and intersex people
item.description: The proposed Transgender Persons (Protection of Rights) Amendment Bill, 2026, presented in Lok Sabha by Minister Virendra Kumar, has raised deep concerns among transgender and non-binary communities. ...

item.title: Elderly Patients and Human Dignity in the Justice System
item.description: Dr Stellah Bosire reflects on her experiences in police stations and courtrooms, highlighting the intersection of law and medicine. She recounts the ordeal of an elderly cardiac patient and respected ...

item.title: Impeachment Complainant Waives Reply, Case Moves Forward Against VP Sara Duterte
item.description: Lawyer Nathaniel Cabrera, who filed the impeachment complaint against Vice President Sara Duterte, has voluntarily waived his right to file a reply to her formal response. Cabrera explained that filin...

item.title: Middle East conflict endangers Persian Gulf marine and bird life
item.description: The ongoing conflict between the US-Israel alliance and Iran is causing severe threats to the fragile ecosystem of the Persian Gulf. The Gulf, a shallow semi-enclosed sea connected to the Indian Ocean...

item.title: Israel kills Iranian security chief Ali Larijani as Trump criticises UK and Europe for refusing support in Iran conflict
item.description: Israel has conducted a targeted overnight airstrike in Tehran, killing Iran's national security chief Ali Larijani, who was widely seen as the de facto leader following the earlier death of Supreme Le...

item.title: Limpopo floods leave two missing as authorities urge vigilance
item.description: The Limpopo Provincial Government has issued a serious warning to residents as continuous heavy rains cause dangerous floods across the province. Two men remain missing after being swept away by flood...

item.title: Police Deployed Sniper at St. Patrick's Day Party in Waterloo as Precautionary Measure
item.description: During St. Patrick's Day celebrations in Waterloo, Ontario, the presence of a police sniper on a balcony caused alarm among some attendees. However, Scott Blandford, a former tactical officer and curr...

item.title: April diesel and petrol price increases expected to impact South African economy
item.description: South Africans are facing significant fuel price hikes in April, with diesel expected to increase by roughly R7.39 per litre for 500ppm and R7.50 for 50ppm, according to the Central Energy Fund. Petro...

item.title: Karnataka CM Siddaramaiah directs officials to respond to pending legislative questions
item.description: Karnataka Chief Minister Siddaramaiah has formally warned ministers and senior officials regarding their failure to respond to questions raised in the legislative assembly. Following a recent session ...

item.title: Police Respond to Incident at Georgian Mall in Barrie
item.description: Barrie Police are currently investigating an incident that occurred at the Georgian Mall. While details on the nature of the incident have not been fully disclosed, authorities are urging the public t...

item.title: IGP Disu Orders Collection of Inspectors’ Records for Promotion to Assistant Superintendent of Police
item.description: The Inspector-General of Police (IGP), Olatunji Disu, don give instruction make dem compile list of all Inspectors wey qualify to move go Assistant Superintendent of Police (ASP) level. The directive ...

item.title: Morocco awarded 2026 Africa Cup of Nations title after Senegal forfeits final
item.description: The Confederation of African Football (CAF) has officially declared Morocco as the champions of the 2026 Africa Cup of Nations, overturning Senegal's on-field victory. Originally, Morocco lost 1-0 to ...

item.title: President Ruto vows to rescue Nairobi Hospital from fraud and mismanagement
item.description: President William Ruto amesema hataruhusu Hospital ya Nairobi ichukuliwe na wadanganyifu na wabaya nia wanaoitumia vibaya. Akiwa katika hafla moja, rais ameelezea kuwa kama mlinzi wa Kenya Hospital As...

item.title: RBA raises interest rates to 4.10% amid inflation concerns and global uncertainty
item.description: The Reserve Bank of Australia (RBA) raised the official cash rate from 3.85 per cent to 4.10 per cent in its second board meeting of 2026, marking the first split decision since July last year. Govern...

item.title: Oil tankers resume passage through Strait of Hormuz amid Iran tensions
item.description: Oil tankers have begun moving through the Strait of Hormuz again, despite previous congestion caused by Iran's actions. White House economic adviser Kevin Hassett told CNBC that this movement indicate...

item.title: Real Madrid Knock Out Manchester City 5-1 on Aggregate in Champions League After Silva's Red Card
item.description: Real Madrid don show say dem be the real kings of Europe as dem eliminate Manchester City for the UEFA Champions League knockout stage one more time. After winning the first leg 3-0 for home ground, d...

item.title: Pakistan’s Rooftop Solar Expansion Reduces Dependence on Imported Fossil Fuels
item.description: Following record spikes in liquefied natural gas (LNG) prices after Russia’s invasion of Ukraine, Pakistan experienced repeated electricity shortages, exacerbated by a heatwave and soaring energy cost...
